hero.label: THE TEAM BEHIND YOUR GROWTH
hero.title: PRECISION FINANCE,
hero.description: Founded in 2016, Beebee Advisory was built on a simple belief: high-growth companies deserve the same calibre of financial expertise as Fortune 500s — without the overhead of a full in-house team.

story.label: OUR STORY
story.title: BUILT FOR THE AMBITIONS
paragraphs: Beebee Advisory was founded in 2016 with a clear mission: to give high-growth businesses access to the financial infrastructure they deserve. Too many fast-moving companies were making critical decisions without reliable data, reliable books, or reliable advisors.

We set out to fix that. Today, we are a dedicated team of accountants, CFOs, and financial strategists serving clients across North America, Europe, and Asia — delivering the precision of institutional finance, with the partnership of a trusted advisor.
We don't just manage your books. We become your financial backbone — embedded in your operations, accountable to your results, and invested in your success.

members.name: PRATEEK BATRA
members.bio: Prateek brings over 15 years of experience in corporate finance, financial planning, and strategic advisory. He has guided companies from seed stage through IPO, building the financial foundations that enable bold growth.

members.name: RAGHAV BANSAL
members.bio: Raghav leads client relationships and oversees all accounting and compliance operations. His precision-first approach has helped clients across healthcare, fintech, and SaaS achieve flawless financial execution at every stage.

items.title: PRECISION
items.description: Every number matters. We operate to institutional standards of accuracy because your business decisions depend on data you can trust completely.

items.title: TRANSPARENCY
items.description: No black boxes. We explain what we're doing, why we're doing it, and what the numbers mean — so you're always in control.

items.title: PARTNERSHIP
items.description: We embed ourselves in your business as a true financial partner, not just a vendor. Your success is our metric of success.

items.title: ACCOUNTABILITY
items.description: We own our work. Deadlines, deliverables, and results — we hold ourselves to the same standard we hold your books.

globalPresence.label: WHERE WE OPERATE
globalPresence.title: GLOBAL REACH,
globalPresence.description: Our team operates across three continents, giving us the geographic depth to serve companies at every stage of international growth.

philosophy.quote: PRECISION IS NOT JUST OUR STANDARD — IT IS OUR PROMISE TO EVERY CLIENT.

cta.title: READY TO WORK WITH A TEAM
cta.description: Get in touch for a no-obligation discovery call and find out how Beebee Advisory can transform your financial operations.
